headline: Amy’s Kitchen Expansion Tests Costco Member Traffic And Prepared Meal Margins
summary: Amy's Kitchen plans to roll out its best selling organic prepared meals to more than 150 Costco warehouses nationwide. The launch starts in key regions, including Los Angeles, the Bay Area, and Texas, with broader US availability expected afterward. The move expands Costco's organic offering within its prepared meal section and adds another well known brand to its food assortment. For Costco Wholesale, NasdaqGS:COST, this expanded partnership with Amy's Kitchen fits neatly with its role as...
